name: Crisis banner (3-tier)
shipped_artifacts: src/core/crisis-banner.js — 3-tier banner system with Firestore listener
vite.config.js — added crisis-banner.js to CORE_FILES (loads on every page)
design_decision: Used existing platform_announcements/{id} Firestore collection (Founder-only write, all-auth read) instead of new crisis_banner collection. Reusing platform_announcements is rule-deploy-free; new collection would require firestore.rules deploy (AMD-018 gate 2).

acceptance_criteria.evidence: CRITICAL (red), ALERT (amber), NOTICE (blue) styles in tierStyles()

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Founder activation via admin tooling works
Admin SDK script activation works (emergency path)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: scripts/admin/set-crisis-banner.js scaffold pending — Admin SDK auth path requires .service-account.json (gitignored, Founder-managed)
isDismissed() + dismiss() with sessionStorage key per banner-update timestamp
No × button rendered when tier === CRITICAL

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Banner slot precedence per M2 lock
acceptance_criteria.evidence: position: fixed top: 0 z-index: 10000; document.body.style.paddingTop pushes content down

outcome: SHIPPED (5/6 PASS, 1 DEFERRED — Admin SDK emergency path)
downstream_consumers: W2.S1 HQ Home banner override · M2 mobile crisis banner · W4.I3 maintenance window banner
